prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类/理科最低位次分别为13092→11291→10001→34550→25474。2021-2023年位次持续前移（竞争加剧），但2024年广西新高考改革后因专业组划分 导致校最低位次大幅后移至34550，2025年回升至25474。近两年波动较大，2025年基准位次约25474名；该校在广西物理类招生计划：2021-2024年均为117人，2 025年增至120人，2026年计划125人，较2025年扩招约4.2%。扩招通常使位次数字增大（竞争相对缓和），但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科 中国大学排名2026年第80名，近年排名稳定在80名左右，属中上游211；2025年声誉评价偏负面，主要因热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业无人报考，对报考心理 有一定负面影响；2026年声誉仍偏负面，涉及学术不端事件。抖音热度排名第77位（一般），短视频曝光量一般，未形成明显报考热度助推；管理科学与工程为 A级学科（唯一A-及以上），无A+学科，学科优势集中于工管交叉领域，对考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化、计算机类等工科专业 社会热度持续偏高，与合肥工业大学工科特色匹配，有利于吸引考生。广西2026年物理类考生约26.9万人，较2025年（26.0万）增加约3.3%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次25474名、2026年扩招约4.2%（位次数字增大方向）、广西物理类考生增加约3.3%（位次数字增大方向）、学校声誉偏负面（位 次数字增大方向）以及工科专业热度偏高（位次数字减小方向）等多重因素，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约26300名，区间25800-26800名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category/Science were 13092 → 11291 → 10001 → 34550 → 25474. Rankings moved forward from 2021 to 2023 (increased competition), but after Guangxi's new college entrance exam reform in 2024, the minimum ranking dropped significantly to 34550 due to major group divisions, then rebounded to 25474 in 2025. Fluctuations have been large in recent two years, with a baseline ranking of about 25474 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi: 117 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 120 in 2025, and planned 125 in 2026, an expansion of about 4.2% compared to 2025. Expansion usually increases the ranking number (relatively eased competition), but the magnitude is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 80th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable around 80th in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. Reputation evaluation in 2025 was somewhat negative, mainly due to a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors and some majors having no applicants, which negatively impacts application psychology. Reputation in 2026 remains somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents. Douyin popularity ranking is 77th (average), short video exposure is average, not forming a clear boost in application popularity. Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline (the only A- or above), with no A+ disciplines, and disciplinary strengths are concentrated in the intersection of engineering and management, with limited appeal to applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity remains high for engineering majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Computer Science, which match Hefei University of Technology's engineering strengths and help attract applicants. In 2026, Guangxi has about 269,000 Physics Category examinees, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025 (260,000), slightly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the 2025 baseline ranking of 25474, an enrollment expansion of about 4.2% in 2026 (increasing ranking number direction), a 3.3% increase in Guangxi Physics Category examinees (increasing ranking number direction), a somewhat negative university reputation (increasing ranking number direction), and high popularity of engineering majors (decreasing ranking number direction), the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to slightly move back compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking is about 26300, with a range of 25800-26800.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 25800-26800, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as reach options (popular majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering have historical rankings far above the school line, so careful evaluation is needed), and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 25000), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship engineering majors. Hefei University of Technology is known for its engineering strengths, so it is recommended to prioritize majors related to the university's advantageous disciplines (Management Science and Engineering, A-level) and socially popular directions (Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science).
